@@ -44,6 +44,12 @@
     enh_norm = pyln.normalize.loudness(enh_np, loudness, target_loudness)

     enh_norm = np.clip(enh_norm, -1.0, 1.0)

     return enh_norm

+

+def enhance_with_hybrid(noisy_np, conv_model, mg_model, device, target_loudness=-25.0):

+    # First stage: ConvTasNet (use slightly different target for pre-filter)

+    ct_enh = enhance_with_convtasnet(noisy_np, conv_model, device, target_loudness=-30.0)

+    # Second stage: MetricGAN+ on CT output (no norm yet, let MG handle)

+    return enhance_with_metricgan(ct_enh, mg_model, device, target_loudness)
